COURT TRIAL

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Robert Balian. Plaintiff Zafar Shaika appeared in pro per and there being no appearance by Defendant, John Dennis Mantel the case is taken off settlement conference, request for jury trial is stricken and the trial date is confirmed.
